rows.label: qev041309_MSG0001
rows.name:
There's apparently a weird old man
somewhere in NLA who's putting his
life on the line for Miracolle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041309_MSG0002
rows.name:
His name was... what was it again?
I think he went by Wiluug.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041309_MSG0003
rows.name:
Hey, hey, I'm looking for a
Simius Miracolle card, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041309_MSG0004
rows.name:
Also, have you ever seen its favorite
food, a giant snail called an Ashizel?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041309_MSG0005
rows.name:
If you bring that to me along with
the card, I'll give you a pretty
rare Silver Folium Card, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041309_MSG0009
rows.name:
So this is an Ashizel... To
think a Simius munches down
on something this creepy...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041309_MSG0010
rows.name:
...Wait, the card says, "Using the massive
amounts of fat possessed by the Ashizel, the
Simius maintains its robust physical body."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041309_MSG0011
rows.name:
Wow... that was incredibly educational.
Thanks! Take this Silver Folium Card.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041309_MSG0012
rows.name:
I see, that's too bad. Call out to me
anytime if you change your mind, okay?[ST:wait ]
